recheck_list.platform: Drupal 10 / Maple Leaf Marinas shared inventory
recheck_list.reason: aiScraping v2 'No bikes found' 5 consecutive days (Apr 24-28). Dealer's own site bwlodgeandmarina.com has NO inventory pages (sitemap = home/services/events/contact only). Hint URL points to mlmarinas.com/inventory which is the SHARED Drupal 10 Commerce 2 catalog for 22 sister marinas. Bluewater Lodge is listed on the network map but is NOT one of the 14 marinas with a location filter option on /inventory (field_store_location_target_id). No way to attribute inventory to this specific marina without parent-site changes from Maple Leaf Marinas. Brokerage spillover may live on mapleleafyachtsales.com (30 boats total network-wide) but no Honey-Harbour-specific listing observed. Non-paying inactive (active=false, isProspect=false), Honey Harbour ON. Recheck after 7 days in case parent adds Bluewater to the location filter list.

Fix deployed Apr 21 but prod hasn't reflected it. Scraping job stuck running 15+ min at 2026-04-27T23:47Z. Recheck after server restart or redeploy.

## Active: Status dashboard (NEW 2026-04-18)
- SECRET URL (keep in Chip DM only): https://openclawchipbot.github.io/macgyver-scraping-dashboard/f3JOGoKPMiEXmZXRJzHFUT55CrM.html
- Repo: https://github.com/openclawchipbot/macgyver-scraping-dashboard (public, but dashboard filename is unguessable; robots.txt + noindex meta block search engines)
- Bare URL shows "Not Found" — only random-slug path works
- Shows: fixed/transient/skipped in last 7d, actionable queue, total failures, skip-list size, recheck list, active/waiting work
- Auto-refreshes every 4h via `dashboard-refresh` cron (id 89bd79db..., isolated Haiku, light-context, delivery=none)
